code:
import io
import string
import list

fn capitalize(_ w: String) -> String
  match string.byte_at(w, 0)
  when None
    w
  when Some(b)
    if b >= 97 and b <= 122
      let upper = string.from_byte(b - 32)
      let rest = string.substring(w, 1, string.len(w))
      "#{upper}#{rest}"
    else
      w
    end
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when None
    println("")
  when Some(line)
    let words = string.split_whitespace(line)
    let n = list.len(words)
    mut result = ""
    mut i = 0
    while i < n
      match list.get(words, i)
      when None
        i = i
      when Some(w)
        let cap = capitalize(w)
        if i == 0
          result = cap
        else
          result = "#{result} #{cap}"
        end
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println(result)
  end
end
